title: Infrastructure
description: Host, PostgreSQL, Redis and MinIO operational health.

targets.rawSql: SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS backends FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'postgresql.backends'
SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS clients FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'redis.clients.connected'
SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS free FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'minio' AND MetricName = 'minio_cluster_capacity_usable_free_bytes'
SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS health FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'minio' AND MetricName = 'minio_cluster_health_status'

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, Attributes['state'] AS state, avg(Value) AS bytes FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'system.memory.usage' GROUP BY time, state ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, concat(Attributes['device'], ' ', Attributes['direction']) AS series, max(Value)-min(Value) AS bytes FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'system.network.io' GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, MetricName, max(Value)-min(Value) AS operations FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('postgresql.commits','postgresql.rollbacks') GROUP BY time, MetricName ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS memory FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'redis.memory.used' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, MetricName, max(Value)-min(Value) AS requests FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName IN ('redis.keyspace.hits','redis.keyspace.misses') GROUP BY time, MetricName ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, MetricName, avg(Value) AS bytes FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'minio' AND MetricName IN ('minio_cluster_usage_total_bytes','minio_cluster_capacity_usable_free_bytes') GROUP BY time, MetricName ORDER BY time
